title: Puerto Banus Private Yacht Charter Stag: Costs, Boats & Tips 2026
html:
Planning a stag do in Marbella? A private yacht charter in Puerto Banus lets the groom and his party celebrate on the Mediterranean with style, departing from the iconic marina. Expect to pay from EUR 2,400 for a half-day crewed Azimut on a quality motor yacht. BoatHire24 connects groups directly with local operators for skippered charters in Puerto Banus, ensuring a seamless booking.

How much does it cost to rent a boat for a stag in Puerto Banus?

Prices for a private yacht charter stag in Puerto Banus start from EUR 2,400 for a half-day and rise to over EUR 8,000 for a full-day crewed experience. The final cost depends on boat size, duration, season, and extras like catering or watersports. For a group of 10 to 14, expect to budget EUR 3,500 to EUR 5,500 for a full day on a premium motor yacht.

  • Shared boat tour (no exclusive charter): from EUR 80 per person for 3 hours
  • Small motorboat half-day (self-drive if licensed): from EUR 900 for 4 hours
  • Catamaran full-day (crew and drinks included): from EUR 3,200 for 8 hours
  • Crewed luxury yacht full-day (Azimut or similar, with skipper & hostess): from EUR 4,800 for 8 hours

Do you need a licence to rent a boat in Puerto Banus for a stag?

No, you do not need a licence if you hire a crewed yacht with a skipper, which is the standard choice for stag groups. Spanish law requires a recreational licence for self-drive boats over a certain power threshold, but when you book a skippered charter the operator provides the captain. Your group simply enjoys the day. The BoatHire24 listing confirms the exact requirements before booking.

For a stag group, the best tip is to book a crewed motor yacht from Puerto Banus marina, head east towards the Cabopino dunes for a swim stop, and ask the skipper to turn up the music. Most yachts allow bluetooth speakers and a portable cooler, but check with the owner first.

Where to set off in Puerto Banus

The obvious departure point is Puerto Banus itself, the famous marina lined with boutiques and restaurants. Just east, Marbella's Real Club Náutico offers an alternative launch point with direct access to the bay. For a quieter start, consider Cabopino harbour to the east, a smaller marina with easy parking. Many charters also pick up from the beaches of San Pedro de Alcántara or the Estepona marina, a short cruise west. The most popular route is a loop around the Bay of Marbella, stopping at the sandy coves between Cabopino and Elviria.

Which boat to rent for a stag in Puerto Banus

  1. Azimut motor yacht, perfect for luxury and style, sleeps up to 12 guests; from EUR 3,000 half-day. See the Azimut 58 charter page for full details and availability.
  2. Fairline motor yacht, a sporty British choice for 10 guests, ideal for cruising and swimming; from EUR 2,800 half-day.
  3. Lagoon catamaran, stable, spacious decks for up to 20 guests, great for partying; from EUR 4,500 full-day.
  4. Axopar open boat, for a more adventurous stag, fast and versatile for 8 guests; from EUR 1,200 half-day.

Season and licence tips for 2026

The high season runs from June to September, with July and August being peak months when the Levante wind can pick up in the afternoon. These months offer hot weather and calm mornings. If you are self-driving, you need a Spanish recreational navigation licence or an ICC recognised in Spain. However, the simplest approach is to book a crewed yacht through BoatHire24, and the operator confirms all legal requirements.

At a glance

  • Price band: EUR 2,400, EUR 8,000 per day
  • Peak months: June to September
  • Typical trip length: 4 to 8 hours
  • Maximum group size: 12-14 guests on most yachts
  • Currency: EUR
  • Distance: Puerto Banus to Cabopino dunes (7 nautical miles east)

Questions about boat rental in Puerto Banus

Can we bring our own drinks and food on a private charter?

Yes, most skippers allow you to bring your own catering, though some offer premium catering packages at an extra cost.

What is the best time of day for a stag charter?

A morning departure from 10am to 6pm gives you the calmest sea and best sunlight, while afternoon charters capture sunset.

Is it possible to visit Marbella's beaches by boat?

Yes, you can anchor off the beaches of Elviria, Cabopino, or the Marbella coastline, many of which have no road access.

We are 14 people, is that too many for a standard motor yacht?

Some motor yachts carry up to 12; for 14 you may need a catamaran or a larger vessel, so check the BoatHire24 listing capacity.

To secure the perfect vessel for your stag, browse the wide selection on BoatHire24 and compare crewed yachts, prices, and availability. If you own a boat in Puerto Banus, you can list your own and earn income by becoming a host on the platform. Head to become a host to start.

Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Puerto Banus and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
